message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for Atan

Adds 16 comprehensive oracle tests covering:
- Special values: zero, one, negative one
- Special angles: sqrt(3) → π/3, 1/sqrt(3) → π/6
- Infinity handling: ±inf → ±π/2
- NaN propagation
- Range verification: output in (-π/2, π/2)
- Odd function property: atan(-x) = -atan(x)
- Tan inverse identity: tan(atan(x)) = x
- 1D and 2D tensor shapes
- Asymptotic behavior for large/small values
- Monotonicity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
